race.description: Streater Family Butchery Country Boosted (Bm58) Hcp
race.comment: VALEDOR (3) wasted no time getting off the mark as favourite on debut with a dominant victory over 1280m at Muswellbrook on the soft (7) surface. Gets a similar setup for this and should be even stronger over this trip. Hard to hold out. KRYSTINA KERIMA (12) drops sharply in weight with the 3kg claimer after getting off the mark at start eleven with a comfortable win over 1450m at Muswellbrook. Has genuine top-three prospects. MEDDLESOME (6) has been out of the money since a win two back, including last time out when seventh over 1200m at Goondiwindi two weeks ago. Has the ability to make her mark. VENDOR (5) kept coming last time out to finish in the money over 1400m at Warren. Has been in sound form this prep with a win and a placing from three starts. Include.
